name: On Your Side
overview: Daniel is a teenager who goes through all the typical conflicts of his age. Toward the end of the year, he discovers he is about to repeat his year and to help him finish high school and take the entrance exam, his father hires young Hugo to help him. The closeness between the two makes Daniel reevaluate his feelings and desires, while Hugo is forced to deal with his ghosts from the past. Between meetings and conversations, they discover that they are in love with each other. The situation gets complicated when the people around them start to distrust the relationship between the two.

trailers.title: On Your Side - Official Trailer - ENG SUBS BL: Boys Love
